toefl.name: TOEFL iBT
toefl.description: ABD ve Kanada üniversiteleri için uluslararası İngilizce yeterlilik sınavı.

words.example: The aurora borealis is a natural phenomenon caused by solar winds.
The scientist tested her hypothesis through a series of experiments.
Subsequent research confirmed the initial findings.
The implications of this discovery are far-reaching.
The theory is supported by empirical evidence.
The argument needs to be more coherent to be convincing.
The results were ambiguous and required further analysis.
The magnitude of the earthquake was 7.2 on the Richter scale.
Temperatures fluctuate significantly in this region.
Poverty can perpetuate cycles of inequality.

questions.passage: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight into chemical energy. This energy is stored in glucose molecules and used to fuel the plant's activities. The process requires carbon dioxide and water, and produces oxygen as a byproduct.
questions.question: According to the passage, what is produced as a byproduct of photosynthesis?
questions.explanation: Pasaj 'produces oxygen as a byproduct' diyor — oksijen yan ürün olarak üretilir.

questions.passage: The Industrial Revolution, which began in Britain in the late 18th century, fundamentally transformed manufacturing processes. It marked the transition from hand production to machine-based methods and had profound social and economic consequences.
questions.question: What does the passage say the Industrial Revolution transformed?
questions.explanation: 'Fundamentally transformed manufacturing processes' — imalat süreçlerini köklü biçimde dönüştürdü.

questions.passage: Migration patterns of birds are influenced by a combination of factors including temperature changes, food availability, and day length. Scientists have found that birds use the Earth's magnetic field as a navigation tool during long migrations.
questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a factor influencing bird migration?
questions.explanation: Yırtıcı hayvanlar (predator) pasajda geçmiyor. TOEFL'de 'NOT mentioned' sorularına dikkat!

words.example: The discovery led to a new paradigm in physics.
She advocates for educational reform.
The notion that the earth was flat persisted for centuries.
Budget cuts constrained the project's scope.
We must address the underlying causes of the problem.
The instructions were explicit and easy to follow.
The decision seemed arbitrary and unfair.
The two theories eventually converge on one conclusion.
She is a prominent figure in modern literature.
Experts attribute the decline to climate change.

lessons.title: Integrated writing — e-posta pratiği
lessons.scenario: Bir akademik makaleyi okuduktan sonra profesörüne e-posta yazıyorsun. Makaledeki ana argümanı özetle ve kendi görüşünü bir paragrafta ifade et.
lessons.referenceEmail:
Dear Professor Williams,

I am writing to share my thoughts on the article you assigned for this week. The author argues that climate change is primarily driven by human activity, supported by empirical data on carbon emissions over the past century.

I found the argument coherent and well-structured. However, I believe the article could have explored natural fluctuations in climate with greater depth, as these factors also play a role in the overall phenomenon.

Thank you for assigning such a thought-provoking piece. I look forward to discussing it in class.

Best regards,
Alex

lessons.title: Independent writing — fikir savunma
lessons.scenario: Arkadaşın sana 'Do you agree that technology has made people less social?' diye soruyor. Görüşünü kısa ama güçlü bir e-posta ile açıkla. Bir giriş, iki argüman ve sonuç yaz.
lessons.referenceEmail:
Hi Jamie,

That's an interesting question. In my opinion, technology has not made people less social — it has simply changed the way we connect.

Firstly, platforms like video calls and messaging apps allow people to maintain relationships across long distances, which was previously impossible. Secondly, online communities bring together individuals with shared interests who might never have met in person.

Of course, there are risks of over-reliance on screens, but I believe the subsequent benefits outweigh the drawbacks.

What do you think?

Best,
Alex

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Do you prefer studying alone or with others? Give reasons and examples.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I prefer studying alone because I can focus better without distractions. For example, when I study in a library by myself, I can concentrate for longer periods and retain information more effectively.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Can you elaborate on any disadvantages of studying alone?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Certainly. The main drawback is that there is no one to clarify ambiguous concepts immediately. Studying with others allows you to discuss ideas and fill knowledge gaps more quickly.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: The university has announced it will replace the library's physical books with digital resources only. What is your opinion on this?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I disagree with this decision. While digital resources are convenient, physical books are essential for deep reading and academic research. Many students find it easier to annotate and navigate printed materials.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: But wouldn't digital resources save money and space?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That may be true, but the subsequent loss of physical resources could negatively impact students who lack reliable internet access or prefer traditional study methods. The implications go beyond convenience.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Today we'll discuss how cells produce energy. Can anyone tell me what the powerhouse of the cell is?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: The mitochondria. They generate most of the cell's energy through respiration.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Exactly. And what is the main molecule that stores this energy?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That would be ATP, which the cell uses to fuel its activities.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Hi, I'm having trouble registering for the advanced statistics course. The system says it's full.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I see. Have you tried joining the waiting list? Spots often open up before the term begins.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Not yet. How will I know if a place becomes available?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: You'll receive an email notification, and you'll have 48 hours to confirm your enrollment.

ielts.name: IELTS Academic
ielts.description: İngiltere, Avustralya ve Kanada üniversiteleri ile göç başvuruları için uluslararası sınav.

words.example: Researchers analysed data from over 10,000 participants.
A new approach to teaching has been introduced in schools.
The committee will assess the impact of the new policy.
Women constitute 48% of the workforce in this sector.
This word derives from Latin.
The study established a clear link between diet and health.
The graph indicates a steady rise in temperatures.
There was a significant increase in unemployment last year.
Darwin's theory of evolution changed biology forever.
Results vary depending on the conditions of the experiment.
The team conducted a series of experiments.
The consequent rise in prices affected demand.
The data suggests a clear trend.
It is evident that the policy has failed.
Cost is a major factor in the decision.
Different experts interpret the results differently.
We used a qualitative method for this study.
A large proportion of students work part-time.
Further research is needed to confirm this.
There is sufficient evidence to support the claim.

lessons.title: Task 1 — grafik tanımlama e-postası
lessons.scenario: IELTS Writing Task 1 pratiği: Değerlendiricinize bir çubuk grafiği açıklayan kısa bir rapor yaz. Grafik 2010-2020 arasında üç ülkede internet kullanımını gösteriyor: Türkiye %45'ten %82'ye, Almanya %80'den %94'e, Brezilya %35'ten %74'e çıkmış.
lessons.referenceEmail:
The bar chart illustrates the percentage of internet users in Turkey, Germany, and Brazil between 2010 and 2020.

Overall, all three countries experienced a significant increase in internet usage over the decade, with Germany maintaining the highest levels throughout the period.

In 2010, Germany led with 80% of its population online, compared to 45% in Turkey and 35% in Brazil. By 2020, Germany had risen to 94%, while Turkey and Brazil saw more dramatic increases, reaching 82% and 74% respectively.

The most notable change was in Turkey, which nearly doubled its internet usage over the period. Brazil showed a similar upward trend, indicating rapid digital growth in both countries.

lessons.title: Task 2 — argümanlı e-posta
lessons.scenario: IELTS Writing Task 2: 'Some people believe that universities should focus on academic subjects only, while others think they should include practical skills training. Discuss both views and give your opinion.' Arkadaşına bu konuda görüşünü e-posta ile yaz.
lessons.referenceEmail:
Hi Sam,

I wanted to share my thoughts on the debate about university education.

Those who argue for academic-only education believe that universities should develop critical thinking and theoretical knowledge, which constitute the foundation of intellectual growth. They suggest that practical training belongs in the workplace.

On the other hand, many argue that graduates need employable skills from day one. A purely theoretical approach may produce knowledgeable students who struggle to apply what they have learnt.

In my view, a balanced approach is most effective. Universities should establish strong academic programmes while also integrating practical components, as this varies significantly by field — a medical student clearly needs both.

What do you think?

Best,
Alex

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Let's talk about your hometown. What do you like most about where you grew up?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I grew up in Istanbul, which is a fascinating city. What I like most is the variety it offers — you can walk from a historic neighbourhood to a modern district within minutes. The culture and food are also incredible.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Has your hometown changed significantly in recent years?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, significantly. The infrastructure has improved considerably, and new transport links have made it easier to get around. However, the city has also become more crowded, which is a drawback.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Describe a book or article you have read that you found particularly interesting. You should say what it was about, why you chose to read it, and explain why you found it interesting.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'd like to talk about an article I read recently about artificial intelligence and its implications for the job market. I came across it while researching for a university project. The article analysed data from several studies and established that while AI may replace certain roles, it is also likely to create entirely new categories of work. I found it particularly interesting because it challenged my initial assumption that automation would simply reduce employment overall. The approach taken by the author was balanced and well-supported by empirical evidence.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Do you think reading habits have changed with the rise of digital media?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Absolutely. The way people consume information has varied enormously over the past decade. Many now prefer shorter digital content, which may indicate a shift in attention spans. However, I believe long-form reading remains significant for deep understanding.

questions.question: The passage states that renewable energy is now cheaper than fossil fuels in most countries.
questions.explanation: Pasaj 'in some regions' diyor, 'most countries' demiyor — bu yüzden False.
questions.passage: Renewable energy has become increasingly competitive. In some regions, the cost of solar and wind power has fallen below that of fossil fuels, prompting a shift in investment.

questions.question: According to the passage, investment patterns are changing.
questions.explanation: 'prompting a shift in investment' — yatırımda kayma oluyor, yani True.
questions.passage: Renewable energy has become increasingly competitive. In some regions, the cost of solar and wind power has fallen below that of fossil fuels, prompting a shift in investment.

questions.question: The author mentions the number of jobs created by renewable energy.
questions.explanation: İstihdam/iş sayısı pasajda hiç geçmiyor — Not Given.
questions.passage: Renewable energy has become increasingly competitive. In some regions, the cost of solar and wind power has fallen below that of fossil fuels, prompting a shift in investment.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good morning, I'd like to book a room for a conference next month.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Certainly. How many people will be attending, and on which date?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Around fifty people, on the 14th of July.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We have a hall that seats sixty. Would you like me to reserve it and send you a confirmation by email?

yds.name: YDS / YÖKDİL
yds.description: Türk üniversitelerinde akademik kadro ve yüksek lisans için zorunlu İngilizce sınavı.

words.example: The experiment was successful, albeit time-consuming.
There is a discrepancy between the two reports.
His explanation seemed plausible at first.
With automation, many manual jobs have become redundant.
Children are more susceptible to certain infections.
Smoking is detrimental to your health.
Change is inevitable in any growing organization.
The new data contradicts the previous findings.
She felt ambivalent about accepting the job offer.
The drought exacerbated the food shortage in the region.
Obesity has become increasingly prevalent in developed countries.
Trees help mitigate the effects of urban heat.
The committee scrutinized every aspect of the proposal.
Lack of funding hindered the research progress.
He conceded that the opposing argument had merit.
The survey was designed to elicit honest responses.
The discovery had a profound impact on modern medicine.
The original meaning of the text has become obscure over time.
The medication helped alleviate the patient's pain.
The connection between the two events is tenuous at best.
The report offers a comprehensive analysis of the issue.
Her health began to deteriorate rapidly.
The plan is technically feasible but expensive.
The watch has an intricate mechanism.
Notwithstanding the risks, they proceeded.
Safety is of paramount importance.
He was reluctant to admit his mistake.
There is no evidence to substantiate the claim.
Solar power is a viable alternative to coal.
The disease became widespread within weeks.

questions.question: _____ the weather was poor, the outdoor event proceeded as planned.
questions.explanation: 'Although' + tam cümle (subject + verb) gelir. 'Despite' + isim/isim grubu gelir.

questions.question: The results were inconclusive _____ the large sample size.
questions.explanation: 'Despite' + isim grubu ('the large sample size') → zıtlık anlatır. 'Although' cümle ister.

questions.question: She had studied hard; _____, she did not pass the exam.
questions.explanation: 'Nevertheless' = buna rağmen. Zıt bir sonuç için noktalı virgülden sonra kullanılır.

questions.question: The policy was introduced _____ reducing carbon emissions.
questions.explanation: 'So as to' + fiil mastarı (reducing) → amaç bildirir. 'In order that/so that' tam cümle ister.

questions.question: The scientist _____ research changed our understanding of genetics won the Nobel Prize.
questions.explanation: 'Whose' iyelik bildirir — 'the scientist's research' demek istiyoruz.

questions.question: This is the report _____ the committee has been waiting for.
questions.explanation: Rapor bir nesne (thing) → 'which' kullanılır.

questions.question: The candidates _____ applications were rejected were notified by email.
questions.explanation: 'Whose applications' → adayların başvuruları — iyelik ilişkisi, 'whose' doğru.

questions.question: By the time the report _____, the deadline had already passed.
questions.explanation: 'By the time ... had passed' → öncesi için past simple passive: 'was completed'.

questions.question: If the committee _____ the proposal, the project will proceed.
questions.explanation: Type 1 koşul: if + present simple, will + V1. 'approves' doğru.

questions.question: She _____ in this field for over a decade before she retired.
questions.explanation: Geçmişteki bir andan önceki süreç → past perfect: 'had worked'.

questions.passage: The concept of neuroplasticity refers to the brain's ability to reorganize itself by forming new neural connections throughout life. This challenges the long-held belief that the brain is a static organ after childhood. Research has shown that learning new skills, physical exercise, and even meditation can stimulate this process.
questions.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main idea of the passage?
options: The brain stops developing after childhood.
The brain can change and adapt throughout a person's life.
Meditation is the most effective way to improve brain function.
Neural connections are formed only during early childhood.
questions.explanation: Ana fikir: beyin hayat boyunca değişebilir ve uyum sağlayabilir. Bu YDS'de 'main idea' sorusu tipidir.

questions.passage: Urban heat islands occur when cities experience higher temperatures than surrounding rural areas. This phenomenon is largely attributed to the replacement of natural land cover with pavements, buildings, and other heat-absorbing surfaces. The lack of vegetation exacerbates the effect, as trees and plants would otherwise provide cooling through shade and evaporation.
questions.question: According to the passage, which factor exacerbates the urban heat island effect?
options: High levels of rainfall in urban areas
The presence of trees and vegetation
The absence of sufficient plant life
questions.explanation: 'The lack of vegetation exacerbates the effect' — bitki örtüsünün yokluğu etkiyi kötüleştirir.

toeic.name: TOEIC
toeic.description: İş dünyasında İngilizce yeterliliği ölçen, şirketlerin işe alımda kullandığı uluslararası sınav.

lessons.title: TOEIC sık çıkan iş kelimeleri — Grup 1

words.example: Please review the agenda before the meeting.
The company will reimburse your travel expenses.
The procurement department handles all supplier contracts.
The firm has a subsidiary in Germany.
Annual revenue increased by 18% this year.
The goods will be dispatched within 48 hours.
Please send the invoice to our accounts department.
We need to negotiate better terms with the supplier.
All staff must comply with the new safety regulations.
We conduct a full inventory check every quarter.

lessons.title: TOEIC sık çıkan iş kelimeleri — Grup 2

words.example: We have allocated additional funds for the project.
The quarterly report will be presented to the board.
The merger between the two companies was finalized last week.
The company is not liable for damages caused by misuse.
The deadline for applications is the 30th of June.
The economic outlook for next year is cautiously optimistic.
The manager endorsed the proposal without hesitation.
The building has several commercial tenants.
The product comes with a two-year warranty.
Staff turnover has decreased since we improved working conditions.
The travel agent emailed me the full itinerary.
We signed a contract with a new vendor.
Smoking is not allowed on the premises.
The company reduced its expenditure this year.
We plan to recruit five new engineers.
Taxes are deducted from your salary automatically.
The sales forecast looks promising.
We streamlined the approval process.
The compensation package includes health insurance.
The product is now available at retail stores.

questions.question: All employees are required to _____ the new safety guidelines.
questions.explanation: 'Required to' + bare infinitive → 'comply with' doğru form.

questions.question: The shipment was delayed _____ the severe weather conditions.
questions.explanation: 'Due to' + isim grubu → neden bildirir. 'Because' cümle ister.

questions.question: Please make sure all invoices are _____ by the end of the month.
questions.explanation: Passive yapı: 'are processed' — faturalar işleniyor (edilgen).

questions.question: The board approved the budget _____ some members had reservations.
questions.explanation: 'Even though' + tam cümle → zıtlık. 'Despite' isim grubu ister.

questions.question: Ms. Park has been _____ as the new head of procurement.
questions.explanation: 'Has been appointed' — present perfect passive. TOEIC'te sık çıkan yapı.

questions.question: The meeting has been rescheduled _____ Monday morning.
questions.explanation: Günler için 'on' kullanılır: 'on Monday'.

questions.question: Please submit your report _____ Friday at the latest.
questions.explanation: Bir tarihe kadar tamamlanma → 'by Friday'.

questions.question: The new branch is located _____ the city center.
questions.explanation: Geniş alanlar/şehir bölgeleri için 'in'.

questions.question: Sales have increased significantly _____ the last quarter.
questions.explanation: Belirli bir dönem boyunca → 'during the last quarter'.

lessons.title: Sipariş onayı e-postası
lessons.scenario: Tedarikçi firma Brown & Co.'dan Tom Andrews'a sipariş numarası #4821 için teslimat onayı istiyorsun. Siparişin 5 Temmuz'a kadar teslim edilmesi gerektiğini belirt.
lessons.referenceEmail:
Dear Tom,

I am writing to follow up on our recent order, reference number 4821, placed on the 25th of June.

Could you please confirm whether the goods are on schedule for delivery by the 5th of July? This deadline is critical as the items are needed for an upcoming project.

Please also let us know if there are any issues that might affect the timeline so we can make alternative arrangements if necessary.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,
Alex

lessons.title: Toplantı özeti e-postası
lessons.scenario: Ekip arkadaşlarına bugünkü bütçe toplantısının özetini gönderiyorsun. Alınan kararları, sorumluları ve sonraki adımları belirt.
lessons.referenceEmail:
Dear all,

Please find below a summary of today's quarterly budget meeting.

Key decisions: The board approved an additional allocation of $15,000 for the procurement department. The marketing budget will remain unchanged for Q3.

Action points: Sarah will prepare the revised financial report by Friday. Tom will negotiate updated terms with our main supplier by the end of next week.

The next meeting is scheduled for the 15th of July at 10:00 AM. Please review the agenda in advance.

Best regards,
Alex

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Alex, I just heard the shipment from our supplier has been delayed again. What should we do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'll contact the supplier right away to find out the new delivery date. In the meantime, can you check our current inventory to see how long we can manage?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good idea. I'll run an inventory check this afternoon. Do you think we need to find an alternative supplier?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: It's worth looking into. If this keeps happening, we may need to renegotiate the contract terms or consider switching to a more reliable vendor.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good morning, I'm calling about invoice number 7742. There seems to be a discrepancy in the amount.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Good morning. I'm sorry to hear that. Could you tell me what the discrepancy is so I can look into it?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: The invoice shows $4,500 but our purchase order was for $4,200. That's a difference of $300.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I apologize for the confusion. I'll check with our accounts department and send you a revised invoice by the end of today. We will reimburse any overcharge, of course.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Could you tell me where the nearest printer is?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Sure, it's just down the hall, next to the supply room on your right.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Great, thanks. Do I need a code to use it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, you'll need your employee ID number to release any print jobs.
